info.title: Upul E-com API
info.description: Complete API for Upuls.lk e-commerce platform with authentication, product management, orders, analytics, and admin features

post.description: Create a new user account with email, password and personal information. Returns verification OTP sent to email.

201.description: User registered successfully, OTP sent to email

400.description: Validation error - invalid email format, weak password, or email already exists

post.description: Verify the user's email address using the OTP received during registration

200.description: Email verified successfully, user account created

post.description: Send OTP to user's email for password reset

200.description: Password reset OTP sent to email

post.description: Verify the OTP sent for password reset
Set new password after verifying OTP
Authenticate user with email and password. Rate limited to 15 attempts per 15 minutes.

200.description: Login successful, returns JWT access token

accessToken.description: JWT access token for authenticated requests

429.description: Too many login attempts, account temporarily locked

post.description: Get a new JWT token using the current token

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile information
Invalidate current session/token

post.description: Add a new shipping address to user's account

newAddress.description: Address object with street, city, postal code, etc.

delete.description: Remove an address from user's account

patch.description: Mark an address as the default shipping address

parameters.name: addressId
parameters.description: ID of address to set as default

get.description: Retrieve authenticated admin user's profile

delete.description: Permanently delete the authenticated user's account. Requires password confirmation.

get.description: Retrieve user count, role distribution, and trend analytics
Generate and download user data in specified format (Excel/PDF)
Get paginated list of users with filtering and sorting options

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by email, name, or phone number

get.description: Retrieve detailed profile information for a specific user
Retrieve all orders placed by a specific user with filtering

put.description: Change a user's role (user, admin, vendor)

post.description: Update roles for multiple users in a single request

200.description: Roles updated successfully for all users

get.description: Get paginated list of products with advanced filtering, sorting, and search capabilities

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by product name or description

get.description: Retrieve list of countries where products originate from
Admin endpoint to retrieve all products with pagination and search

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by product name or SKU

post.description: Add a new product with variants, images, and pricing information

400.description: Invalid product data or duplicate SKU

get.description: View product stock levels with filtering and search

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by product name or SKU

patch.description: Update stock levels for multiple products at once

get.description: Generate inventory report in specified format (Excel/PDF)
Generate product listing report with visibility filter
Retrieve detailed product information using URL-friendly slug
Retrieve product details using stock keeping unit

put.description: Modify product details, pricing, stock, and attributes

delete.description: Remove a product from the system

patch.description: Show or hide product from customer shop view

get.description: Retrieve category hierarchy with optional filtering

parameters.name: parentId
parameters.description: Get only subcategories of specified parent

post.description: Add a new product category

get.description: Get breadcrumb path from root to specified category

put.description: Update sort order for multiple categories
Modify category name and sort order

get.description: Retrieve list of all available brands

post.description: Add a new brand with logo

delete.description: Remove brand (cannot delete if linked to products)

400.description: Brand linked to products, cannot delete

get.description: Retrieve authentication token and parameters for file uploads
Retrieve available size type standards (S/M/L, XS/S/M/L/XL, etc.)

post.description: Add new size type with available values

put.description: Modify size type name and available values

get.description: Retrieve list of available product colors

post.description: Add a new color option with hex code
Check if all cart items are still available and in stock

post.summary: Merge local cart with user cart
post.description: Sync local shopping cart items after user login

get.description: Retrieve user's current shopping cart contents

post.description: Add product to shopping cart with quantity and options

put.description: Change the quantity of an item in the cart

delete.description: Delete a product from shopping cart

get.description: Retrieve user's wishlist items

post.description: Add or remove product from wishlist
Sync local wishlist items after user login
Place a new order. For PayHere payment, returns payment parameters. Order is reserved in Redis during checkout.

items.description: Order items with SKU and quantity

200.description: Order created (for PayHere, returns payment params)

400.description: Invalid order data or insufficient stock

429.description: Too many order attempts, rate limited

get.description: Retrieve order details using guest tracking token

patch.description: Cancel order by guest using tracking token

400.description: Order cannot be cancelled in current status

get.description: Check if an order number exists in the system
Retrieve authenticated user's order history
Retrieve details of a specific order (must be user's own order)

403.description: Forbidden - order belongs to another user

patch.description: Cancel an order placed by the authenticated user

400.description: Order cannot be cancelled (already shipped, delivered, etc.)

post.description: Mark order as refunded, restore stock, and send notification email

400.description: Order cannot be refunded in current status

get.description: Admin view of all orders with filtering and search

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by order number, customer name, or email

get.description: Retrieve count of orders by status
Generate orders report in specified format with date and status filters
Admin view of complete order information including customer details

patch.description: Change order status (PENDING → PROCESSING → SHIPPED → DELIVERED). Triggers email notification and updates stock if needed.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: New status and optional tracking details

trackingNumber.description: Tracking number for shipment (for SHIPPED status)

200.description: Order status updated successfully, notification email sent

post.description: Webhook endpoint for PayHere payment notifications. Called by PayHere after payment processing. Updates order status and creates order in database if payment successful.

400.description: Invalid notification data or signature mismatch

404.description: Order not found in Redis cache

post.description: Check if coupon is valid for checkout (checks expiry, usage limits, minimum amount)

get.description: Get all coupons (admin only)

post.description: Add a new discount coupon

delete.description: Remove a coupon from the system

get.description: Retrieve promotional images (banners, sliders) by section

post.description: Add promotional image to website
Submit contact form message from customers

200.description: Contact message received and sent to admin

get.description: Retrieve available product size chart images

post.description: Upload a new size chart image

put.description: Modify size chart image or name

delete.description: Remove size chart and its image

get.description: Retrieve list of cities where shipping is available (for checkout dropdown)

post.description: Add a new city to the shipping service

get.description: Admin view - retrieve all cities including inactive ones

put.description: Modify city shipping cost or status

delete.description: Remove a city from shipping destinations

400.description: Cannot delete city with active orders

get.description: Retrieve site announcements/notices

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: Get all or only active announcements

post.description: Add a new site-wide announcement or notice

text.example: Free shipping on orders over Rs. 5000!

post.description: Add email to newsletter subscription list
Remove email from newsletter mailing list

get.description: Check if logged-in user is subscribed to newsletter

post.description: Subscribe or unsubscribe the logged-in user from newsletter

get.description: Admin: View all newsletter subscribers with pagination and filtering

post.description: Send email campaign to all newsletter subscribers

get.description: View pending, sent, and failed email counts
Admin: View sent/failed emails with filtering

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by recipient email or subject

get.description: View email metrics and trends
View all emails sent related to a specific order

post.description: Manually resend a failed email

delete.description: Delete email logs older than specified number of days

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Delete logs older than N days

get.description: Admin: View payment transaction history
Retrieve dashboard statistics and metrics
Retrieve best-selling products for specified period
Retrieve most valuable customers for specified period
